title: Database validate (referential integrity)
description: Given a database with belongs_to associations, when I call db.validate(), it should walk all FKs and verify each resolves to a record in the target table. Returns a list of violations. Spec: features/query/database_validate.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: starting database validate (referential integrity) story; will plan validation hooks post schema load. Next: craft specs then implement validations. Blockers: none.
